title:
Lesson 1:
It's Done / I Just Arrived
description: 'Bitti' = It's over / It's done / All gone. 'Az önce geldim' = I just arrived. 'Randevum var' = I have an appointment (or a date).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Did the movie end?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Yes, it ended ten minutes ago.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I just arrived! I missed it.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Why were you so late?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I had a doctor's appointment. It ran long.

vocabulary.english: it's over / it's done / all gone
I have an appointment / a date

title:
Lesson 2:
Trendy / Family Introductions
description: 'Modaya uygun' or 'Trend' = It's trendy / in fashion. For family: 'Annem' = my mom, 'Babam' = my dad, 'Oğlum' = my son, 'Kızım' = my daughter, 'Amcam' = my uncle, 'Teyzem' = my aunt.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What a beautiful bag! Is it new?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Evet, şu an çok modaya uygun. Bir dergide gördüm.
dialogue.english: Yes, it's very trendy right now. I saw it in a magazine.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Hi! Who is that?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: My mom. And that's my uncle.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Nice to meet you. Who is the child?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: My son. He's four years old.

title:
Lesson 3:
More or Less / Almost / Nothing
description: 'Şöyle böyle' = so-so / more or less. 'Hiçbir şey' = nothing. 'Boşver' = never mind / forget it / let it go. 'Neredeyse' = almost. 'Bunu denemelisin' = you have to try this.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: How was the journey?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: So-so. There was traffic.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Did you arrive on time?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Almost. I was five minutes late.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Did you eat anything?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Hiçbir şey. Ama yeni bir restoran buldum. Bunu denemelisin!
dialogue.english: Nothing. But I found a new restaurant. You have to try this!

title:
Lesson 4:
For / Against / Think About It
description: 'Destekliyorum' = I support it / I'm in favor. 'Karşıyım' = I'm against it. 'Düşün' = Think about it / Consider it. 'Hâlâ zamanın var' = You still have time.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What do you think about the new project?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I support it. It could work.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I'm against it. It's too expensive.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Think carefully before deciding.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: You still have time, you can change your mind.

vocabulary.english: I support it / I'm in favor
